name: CMP_INSTRUCTIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.INSTRUCTION_ID, B.KEY_TYPE, B.INSTRUCTION_KEY, B.INSTRUCTION_TYPE, T.INSTRUCTION_TEXT, B.COMP_TYPE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID FROM CMP_INSTRUCTIONS_B B, CMP_INSTRUCTIONS_TL T WHERE B.INSTRUCTION_ID = T.INSTRUCTION_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
